title: Pasta's Custom Additions
body:
This datapack adds a few recipes as well as edits some recipes of modded items that are a part of my modpack Pasta's Cobblemon Experience, as well as backporting a couple of recipes from newer releases of Minecraft. In addition, it now also adds custom spawn conditions for unimplemented Pokémon in Cobblemon and Mega Showdown.

The following mods should be installed to get the most of the datapack:
- Cobblemon
- Cobblemon: Mega Showdown
- Create
- Comforts
- Nature's Compass

The following items had their modern recipes added to the datapack:
- Lodestone
- Saddle

The datapack can be used independently of my modpack and can be used or edited by anyone who wants to, and can be used in other modpacks as well without needing my permission to do so.

The thumbnail is based on the thumbnail of my modpack, which in turn is based on [this](https://x.com/lolcomicstime/status/1305728622624415744) comic.
